_descricao: Example configuration file for NFe DestSync. Copy this file, rename it to config.json, and replace all example values with your company data.
_importante: Do not commit your real config.json to GitHub.
Use only digits in CNPJ fields, without dots, slashes or hyphens.
EmpresaDestino defines the company that will replace the NF-e dest block.
EmpresasValidas defines which original recipient companies are allowed to be converted.
If the original recipient CNPJ is not listed in EmpresasValidas, the XML will not be changed.

_configuracoes.CriarBackup: false = does not create an extra copy in XML/Backup. The original file is moved to XML/Processados.
_configuracoes.SobrescreverConvertidos: false = never overwrites converted files. If the name already exists, the program creates (1), (2), etc.
_configuracoes.GerarLogCsv: true = creates daily CSV logs inside the Logs folder.

_como_configurar_empresas_validas.explicacao: List all CNPJs that the tool can accept as the original NF-e recipient.
_como_configurar_empresas_validas.formato: Use CNPJ without punctuation as the key and the company legal name as the value.

_como_configurar_empresa_destino.explicacao: Fill in the full destination company data. This data will be used to build the new NF-e dest block.
_como_configurar_empresa_destino.xNome: Full legal name of the destination company.
_como_configurar_empresa_destino.enderDest: Full destination address following the NF-e structure.
_como_configurar_empresa_destino.indIEDest: Recipient state registration indicator. Usually 1 when the company has state registration.
_como_configurar_empresa_destino.email: Email that will be written into the dest block.
